item.title: Basics of Networking in Kubernetes
item.description: Container Networking Basics (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes) Description: How individual containers communicate with each other and with the outside world.

item.title: Azure Services
item.description: Popular Azure Services Compute Services Azure Virtual Machines (VMs): Description: Allows you to create and run virtual computers (servers) in the cloud.

item.title: AWS Services
item.description: Popular AWS Services Compute Services Amazon EC2 (Elastic Compute Cloud): Description: This is like renting virtual computers (servers) in the cloud.

item.title: Docker and Dockerfile
item.description: Dockerfile in High-Level Below is an example Dockerfile of a Java Spring-Boot application FROM eclipse-temurin:8-jdk ---- Base Image ADD risk-listener.jar app.jar ---- Adding the JAR file EXPOSE 8080 ---- exposing a port through which application will receive request ENV SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=not-l...

item.title: Ansible
item.description: Ansible is an open-source IT automation tool. It has many built-in modules which are dedicated for each task.

item.title: Home
item.description: My knowledge garden built with Quartz

item.title: CD Pipeline in High-Level
item.description: Stages Git Checkout Docker image build - See Docker and Dockerfile Docker Image push Secret Deployment - See the Secret from AWS SM Deployment - See Types of Kubernetes Deployment Service Deployment Sending Notification .

item.title: Questions
item.description: What are some application of AI in DevOps? AI in DevOps, often termed AIOps, applies machine learning and artificial intelligence to enhance and automate IT operations and the entire software delivery lifecycle.
